prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-HARPOONPOINTKNIFE-STD-FBA Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Harpoon Point 8 Inch Full Tang Fixed Blade Hunting Knife with Wood Handle and Belt Loop Sheath Description: Ready for any challenge, this rugged knife combines a sharp harpoon point blade with full tang construction for unmatched strength and durability. Full tang, harpoon point fixed blade knife weighs in at 0.45lbs, making it a hefty and reliable survival tool, hunting knife or general outdoor use knife.

What makes this knife stand out is the harpoon point shaped blade design, ideal for controlled cutting and precision tasks. The harpoon point design features a sharp, pointed tip that is ideal for piercing and stabbing. Its shape allows for controlled, accurate cuts and deep penetration into materials, whether it's for game, rope, or even wood. And, the unique upward ramped shape makes for a particularly strong, reinforced tip, while the distinctive spine ramp provides a natural thumb rest, creating leverage and control during cutting tasks.

Featuring excellent edge retention and corrosion and rust resistance, the thick fixed blade is constructed of 440 Stainless Steel (blade measures 4.25 inches in length). The handle is made of wood, providing a comfortable and secure grip during use.

And, for added convenience, the fixed blade knife comes with a durable belt loop sheath, allowing easy access and safe storage while you're on the move. Whether you're packing for outdoor adventures, are out in the field hunting, or need a dependable tool for survival situations, ASR Outdoors Eight Inch Harpoon Point Fixed Blade Knife can handle it all, and will perform well in even the harshest environments. Search Terms: Tactical hunting fixed blade knife; outdoor gear; gifts for men; emergency preparedness items; survival kit; bug out bag; full tang knife with sheath; knives; camping essentials; backpacking; self defense; wilderness first aid kit; bushcraft tools Features: - HARPOON POINT BLADE: Featuring a 8 inch harpoon shaped blade, this knife offers a strong and sharp blade ideal for controlled cutting and precision tasks; the upward ramped shape makes for a particularly strong, reinforced tip - FIXED BLADE FULL TANG CONSTRUCTION: Heavy duty hunting and utility knife makes a reliable companion for hunting, survival and outdoor excursions; thick full tang and fixed blade with wooden handle can do it all - 440 STAINLESS STEEL BLADE: Features excellent edge retention and corrosion resistance, making the full tang knife suitable for a variety of cutting and other tasks in different environments; blade measures 4.25 inches in length - EXTRA LEVERAGE: The distinctive spine ramp provides a natural thumb rest, creating leverage and control during cutting tasks; additionally, the pointed tip excels at piercing, making these blades both stylish and functional - SHEATH WITH BELT LOOP: Sheath featuring a belt loop ensures safe storage and easy on person carrying for quick access; wooden handle also features built in lanyard hole (not included) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8 Inch Harpoon Point Fixed Blade Hunting Knife

tokens.name: Harpoon Point Fixed Blade Hunting Knife

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8-in Fixed Blade Hunting Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: Full Tang 440 Stainless Steel, Wood Handle, Belt Loop Sheath, Thumb Rest Spine Ramp, Piercing Tip

openai.title_differentiation: Full Tang Construction, 440 Stainless Steel Blade, Harpoon Point Tip, Wood Handle, Belt Loop Sheath
